name: Supreme Burgers
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all the ingredients together in a large bowl.
2. Shape the mixture into 8 patties, each about 3/4-inch thick.
3. Broil or grill the patties, keeping them 4-inches from the heat source. Turn the patties once to achieve the desired doneness, which should take approximately 10 to 15 minutes.
